message:
feat(storage): Add daily_stats materialized aggregates (Opt 3.2)

Implements Opt 3.2: Prefix Sum for Time-Range Histograms to enable O(1)
range queries for analytics and dashboard stats.

Changes:
- Add daily_stats table schema (migration V8)
- Add helper functions: day_id_from_millis, millis_from_day_id
- Add count_sessions_in_range with fallback to direct COUNT(*)
- Add get_daily_histogram for activity visualization
- Add rebuild_daily_stats for recovery/sync
- Add update_daily_stats_for_conversation for incremental updates
- Add daily_stats_health to detect drift
- Update schema version from 7 to 8
- Add comprehensive tests for all daily_stats functionality

The daily_stats table stores pre-aggregated session/message counts per
day, agent, and source. This enables fast time-range queries without
scanning the full conversations table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
